const class_t *  cl2 
)

Checks if two classes belong to the same package

Parameters:
cl1 A class pointer
cl2 A class pointer

True if both classes belong to the same package

void verify_field ( const class_t *  cl,
const field_info_t *  info,
const field_attributes_t *  attr 
)

Verify the validity of a field

If the verification of the field fails this function will throw a verification exception

Parameters:
cl A pointer to the class to which the field belongs
info A pointer to the field_info structure representing the field
attr A pointer to the field_attributes structure holding the field attributes

void verify_field_access ( const class_t *  acl,
const class_t *  cl,
const field_t *  field 
)

Check if the field field of class dst is accessible from class src

This function throws a verification exception if the field is not accessible

Parameters:
acl The class trying to access the field
cl The class to which the field belongs
field The field to be accessed
